$comment: Arke project config (SPEC-016 revised), created by `arke` scaffolding. `providers` are host-side provider/auth profiles: the harness endpoint + a credentialsRef resolved on the host (never sent to the client). Agents declare their own model+provider in agents/<name>/config.yaml and reference a profile by executor.config.auth.profile. Replace the gateway placeholder models in the agent images with real vendor ids. Process-wide coordinator settings (port, maxProjects, OTLP) come from the global/launch source, not this file.
